title: langflow-ai/langflow
summary: Langflow 是一个用于构建和部署 AI 驱动的代理和工作流的强大工具。它支持代理、ChatGPT、生成式 AI、大语言模型、多代理等功能，并基于 React Flow 构建。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有 152201 颗星，表明其受欢迎程度和技术价值。
summary_en: Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows. It supports agents, ChatGPT, generative AI, large language models, multi-agent, and is built on React Flow. The project has 152201 stars on GitHub, indicating its popularity and technical value.
